items.name: 国府厨印
items.location: 境山2丁目1-12（歴史資料館寄託管理）

en.name_en: Seal of the Provincial Government Kitchen
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of historical materials. Town-designated by Shichigahama Town in 1971. Deposited at 2-1-12 Sakaiyama (managed by the local history museum).

items.name: 湊浜薬師堂及び薬師座像並びに榧の木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 湊浜字熊野、字砂山地内

en.name_romaji: Minatohama Yakushidō oyobi Yakushi Zazō narabini Kaya no Ki
en.name_en: Minatohama Yakushi Hall, Seated Yakushi Statue, and Nutmeg-yew Tree
en.description_en: A monument in the category of historic sites. Town-designated by Shichigahama Town on 1981-10-01. Located in the Kumano and Sunayama areas, Minatohama, Shichigahama Town.

items.name: 鼻節神社
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument in the category of historic sites. Town-designated by Shichigahama Town on 1990-04-01. Located at Daredō, Habuchihama, Shichigahama Town.
A tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. Town-designated by Shichigahama Town on 1990-04-01. Located at Kageta, Yogasakihama, Shichigahama Town.

items.name: 下がり松
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument in the category of natural monuments (a pine tree). Town-designated by Shichigahama Town on 1990-04-01. Located at 54-16 Hosoda, Yogasakihama, Shichigahama Town.

items.name: 「鰐鮫頭骨収納箱」附鰐鮫頭骨および釣針
items.location: 境山2丁目1-12（歴史資料館寄託管理）

en.name_romaji: "Wanizame Zukotsu Shūnō-bako" Tsuketari Wanizame Zukotsu oyobi Tsuribari
en.name_en: "Shark Skull Storage Box" with Shark Skull and Fishhook
en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the category of tangible folk cultural properties. Town-designated by Shichigahama Town on 1998-08-01. Deposited at 2-1-12 Sakaiyama (managed by the local history museum).

items.name: 吉田浜獅子舞
items.location: 吉田浜字宮前11-1（吉田神社）

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the category of intangible folk cultural properties. Town-designated by Shichigahama Town on 1985-03-01. Located at 11-1 Miyamae, Yoshidahama, Shichigahama Town (Yoshida Shrine).
